# Regain Hope Detox and Recovery Center

> Physician-owned medical detox and residential treatment in Burbank, California. Two physicians are on-site and in person every day, delivering whole-person medical care in a small, boutique home setting. Care is available in English, Spanish, and Korean, and the admissions line is open 24/7.

Key facts:
- Address: 1134 N Lima St, Burbank, CA 91505 (serving greater Los Angeles and the San Fernando Valley; clients accepted from out of state)
- Admissions (24/7): (818) 281-2458
- Out-of-network provider; most PPO plans accepted; free, no-obligation insurance benefits verification
- Differentiators: physician-owned and operated, doctors on-site daily, couples accepted, flexible technology policy for working professionals, multilingual care (English, Spanish, Korean)
- Accreditations: Joint Commission, California DHCS licensed, LegitScript certified

## Programs
- [Programs overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/): The full continuum of care, from detox through aftercare.
- [Medical Detox](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/medical-detox/): 24/7 physician-supervised, medically managed withdrawal (about 5-10 days).
- [Residential Treatment](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/residential-treatment/): Live-in care in a comfortable home setting after detox.
- [Dual Diagnosis Treatment](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/dual-diagnosis-treatment/): Addiction and co-occurring mental health conditions treated together.
- [Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT)](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/medication-assisted-treatment/): Vivitrol and other tools to ease withdrawal and prevent relapse.
- [Continuing Care](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/programs/continuing-care/): Aftercare and trusted step-down referrals (IOP, sober living).

## What We Treat
- [What We Treat overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/): Substances and co-occurring conditions treated.
- [Alcohol](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/alcohol/)
- [Opioids & Fentanyl](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/opioids/)
- [Benzodiazepines](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/benzodiazepines/)
- [Stimulants (Meth & Cocaine)](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/stimulants/)
- [Prescription Drugs](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/prescription-drugs/)
- [Polysubstance](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/what-we-treat/polysubstance/)

## Who We Help
- [Who We Help overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/): Personalized care for specific communities.
- [Professionals & Executives](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/professionals-executives/): Discreet care with a flexible technology policy.
- [LGBTQ+](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/lgbtq/): Affirming, judgment-free treatment.
- [Veterans & First Responders](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/veterans-first-responders/)
- [Spanish-Speaking](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/spanish-speaking/): Full treatment in Spanish.
- [Korean-Speaking](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/who-we-help/korean-speaking/): Full treatment in Korean.

## Admissions
- [Admissions overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/admissions/): How to begin treatment.
- [Verify Your Insurance](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/admissions/verify-insurance/): Free, confidential benefits check.
- [What to Expect](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/admissions/what-to-expect/)
- [What to Bring](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/admissions/what-to-bring/)
- [For Families](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/admissions/for-families/): Guidance for loved ones.

## Insurance
- [Insurance overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/): Out-of-network with most PPO plans; free verification.
- Accepted carriers include: [Aetna](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/aetna/), [Anthem](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/anthem/), [Blue Cross Blue Shield](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/blue-cross-blue-shield/), [Cigna](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/cigna/), [UnitedHealthcare](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/united-healthcare/), [Kaiser](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/kaiser/), [Humana](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/humana/), [Health Net](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/health-net/), [TRICARE](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/insurance/tricare/).

## Locations & Service Areas
- [Locations overview](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/): One Burbank home serving the greater LA metro.
- Service areas: [Glendale](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-glendale/), [Sherman Oaks](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-sherman-oaks/), [Pasadena](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-pasadena/), [Toluca Lake](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-toluca-lake/), [La Cañada Flintridge](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-la-canada-flintridge/), [Encino](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-encino/), [Studio City](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/locations/detox-studio-city/).

## About & Team
- [About Us](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/about-us/): A small, physician-owned and operated program.
- [Meet the Team](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/about-us/team/): The clinical team, including Mileidys Gomez Gonzalez, MD (Founder, CEO & Addiction Medicine Specialist), Nora A. O'Connor, LCSW, and Jack Gould, CADC.
- [Accreditations](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/about-us/accreditations/): Joint Commission, DHCS, LegitScript.

## Blog
- [Blog](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/blog/): Medically reviewed articles on detox and recovery.
- [How Long Does Alcohol Detox Take?](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/blog/how-long-does-alcohol-detox-take/)
- [Is It Safe to Detox from Benzodiazepines at Home?](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/blog/detox-from-benzodiazepines-at-home/)
- [What Is Dual Diagnosis?](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/blog/what-is-dual-diagnosis/)

## Contact
- [Contact](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/contact/): Call or text 24/7 at (818) 281-2458; 1134 N Lima St, Burbank, CA 91505.
- [Crisis Resources](https://www.regainhopedetox.com/crisis-resources/): In a crisis, call or text 988, or 911.
